articles.title: Elon Musk requests dismissal of $258B Dogecoin lawsuit: Report
articles.description: The plaintiffs referred to Musk’s 2021 Saturday Night Live appearance, during which he played “a fictitious financial expert” and called Dogecoin “a hustle,” causing the price of DOGE to sharply decline minutes after the show.
